title: Birthday Party Invitation 生日派对邀请
scene: Lily想邀请好朋友Emma参加自己的生日派对。

lines.en: Emma, guess what? My birthday is next Saturday!
lines.zh: Emma，你猜怎么着？我下周六过生日！

lines.en: Really? Happy early birthday! Are you having a party?
lines.zh: 真的吗？提前祝你生日快乐！你要办派对吗？

lines.en: Yes! I am having a party at home. Can you come?
lines.zh: 对！我在家办派对。你能来吗？

lines.en: I would love to! What time does it start?
It starts at three in the afternoon.
What should I bring? A gift?
Just yourself! But if you want, bring your favorite snack.
lines.zh: 人来就好！不过如果你想，可以带最爱的零食。

lines.en: Great! Will there be a cake?
Of course! My mom is making a chocolate cake.
lines.zh: 当然！我妈妈要做巧克力蛋糕。
